fires.name: Park Fire
fires.summary: The Park Fire in Tehama and Butte counties is now the fourth-largest in California history. Over 5,800 firefighters are assigned. Structures destroyed: 214.

fires.name: Varympompi Fire
fires.summary: A fast-moving wildfire near Athens has forced the evacuation of several suburbs. Strong winds are hampering aerial operations. Canadian water bombers have been deployed.
